source: Rime of the Frostmaiden (Icewind Dale Gazetteer)
blizzard_events: Whiteout -- visibility drops to 10 feet, all checks at disadvantage
Frozen gear -- one random piece of equipment becomes unusable until thawed
Windchill -- Constitution save DC 13 or gain 1 level of exhaustion
Snow drift blocks path -- Strength DC 15 to push through or find detour
Ice sheet -- Dexterity save DC 12 or fall prone, slide 20 feet
Shelter found -- abandoned cabin or ice cave provides short rest opportunity
Aurora borealis -- strange lights in the sky, spellcasters roll on Wild Magic table
Temperature plunge -- all non-magical fire sources extinguished
ten_towns_rumors: The speaker of Bryn Shander has been acting strangely since the solstice
Fishers on Maer Dualdon claim something massive lurks beneath the ice
A duergar was spotted near the outskirts of Easthaven
The Arcane Brotherhood has agents in every town
Auril's followers have been leaving offerings at the Stones of Thruun
A sled dog team returned without their musher from the Spine of the World
The chardalyn trade has attracted unsavory merchants from the south
Someone has been stealing knucklehead trout from Good Mead's stores
Lonely Wood has gone quiet -- no logging teams have returned in days
A tribe of goliaths was seen near Kelvin's Cairn
The cold is getting worse -- Auril demands sacrifice
An elf from the Elven Tomb brought warnings of awakening evil
quest_hooks: Find the lost expedition in the Sea of Moving Ice
Stop the duergar from assembling a chardalyn dragon
Discover why Auril has cursed Icewind Dale with eternal night
Escort a caravan between Ten-Towns through a blizzard
Retrieve a stolen artifact from the Arcane Brotherhood
Help the goliaths of Wyrmdoom Crag fend off a white dragon
Explore the lost city of Ythryn beneath the glacier
Uncover the traitor among the speakers of Ten-Towns
Break the curse on a frozen village near the Spine of the World
